moves.note: Cut all leveraged ETFs to zero
Cut all leveraged ETFs to zero

plan: Trim SPY to 20% to reduce concentration and comply with the mandate.
Increase QQQI to 25% for more income and diversification.
Sell QQQ, SMH, SOXL, and SPAL to exit flagged holdings and eliminate leveraged ETFs.
Trim CRWD to 10% to reduce single name concentration.
Buy OXY at 5% to add a top-quality setup and diversify into a new sector.
Maintain a significant cash buffer of approximately 15-20%.
conservative.read: This conservative plan targets approximately 1.5% monthly, prioritizing capital preservation. Expect lower drawdowns due to reduced leverage and concentration. The risk profile is significantly lower, but so is the potential for large gains.

plan: Trim SPY to 25% to meet the concentration mandate.
Reduce QQQI to 10% and sell QQQ to exit flagged holdings.
Sell SMH and SPAL, and trim SOXL to 2% to reduce leveraged ETF exposure.
Increase CRWD to 15% to lean into a strong performer.
Buy MSFU at 8% and OXY at 5% from the top scanner setups for growth and diversification.
Maintain a cash buffer of approximately 10%.
balanced.read: This balanced plan targets approximately 2.5% monthly, focusing on risk-first growth. It reduces overall leverage and concentration while blending broad index and quality tech. Expect moderate drawdowns, with a balanced approach to risk and reward.

plan: Trim SPY to 25% to meet the concentration mandate.
Sell QQQI, QQQ, SMH, and SPAL to exit flagged holdings and reallocate capital.
Increase CRWD to 20% to press into a strong performer.
Add SOXL to 10% to increase leveraged exposure to semiconductors.
Buy MSFU at 10% and TZA at 5% from the top scanner setups.
Maintain a smaller cash buffer of approximately 5%.
aggressive.read: This aggressive plan targets approximately 4% monthly, aiming for stretch growth. It utilizes and adds leveraged ETFs, increasing both upside potential and drawdown risk. Be aware of higher volatility and the daily decay/rebalancing of leveraged ETFs; strict stop discipline is crucial.

moves.note: Cut all leveraged ETFs to zero
Cut all leveraged ETFs to zero

plan: Trim SPY to 20% to reduce concentration and free capital for income.
Increase QQQI to 30% for a significant boost in income focus.
Sell QQQ, CRWD, SMH, SOXL, and SPAL to eliminate high-beta and leveraged holdings.
Buy OXY at 5% to add a stable dividend payer from the scanner list.
Prioritize low drawdown and reliable income over growth.
Maintain a cash buffer for flexibility.
income.read: This income plan targets approximately 1% monthly, prioritizing steady distributions. It significantly reduces leverage and high-beta exposure, focusing on income-generating ETFs and stable names. While aiming for consistent income, distributions are variable, and NAV can still decline in market downturns.
